creator: ltning-freebsd@anduin.net
text:
While my main problem still persists, I have resolved the NSS problem; I found the solution here:
https://bugs.launchpad.net/ubuntu/+source/nss/+bug/1960736

All I did was
rm ~/.pki/nssdb/pkcs11.txt

However, this does not change the behaviour of signal-desktop. Only that initial log line is avoided.

/Eirik
